description: I want to build a report generation page, where i can select the devices i need and the values required and the duration and then i can generate a task as PDF or xlsx to download , also there should be a button to subscripe to this report so every specifc time (can be selected from the user like every hour , every day .... , or a specifc date like first of every month , or a specifc time and date can be selected from a calander form field ) it will save this to the local machine that is hosting the docker container hard drive
